title: fitme story design system p2 cleanup

events.summary: Phase 2 (Tasks) opened. Enhancement work_type — skipped Research/PRD/UX (audit doc + parent feature provide basis). Burning down 16 P2 items from docs/research/2026-05-10-fitme-story-design-system-lens-audit.md: 6 Card migrations + 3 Stat migrations + 7 polish items.

Phase 2 (Tasks) approved by user. 12 tasks across 10 buckets. Enhancement scope: T1 Card×5 + T2 Stat×3 + T3 Tag×4 + T4 ExternalLink + T5 divider class + T6 heading scale + T7 Hero elevation + T8 5 polish items + T9-T11 verify + T12 case study.
Phase 4 (Implementation) opened. Creating isolated worktree at /Volumes/DevSSD/fitme-story-p2-cleanup off origin/main per v7.8.1.

Phase 4 (Implementation) complete. PR #84 (squash 185c0d8) merged 18:45:11 UTC. 4 of 8 planned tasks shipped: T1 Card×5 + T2 Stat×1 + T4 ExternalLink + T5 .divider-row class. T3/T6/T7/T8 explicitly deferred with rationale.
Phase 5 (Testing) opened. CI on PR #84 passed: build green, drift 0 findings, public Figma parity 20/20 = 100% maintained.
Phase 5 complete. CI green; drift 0; build passed. Operator visual spot-check pending post-deploy (documented as kill-criteria check in PR #84).

Phase 6 opened in-session. Pre-merge review via CI checks (gates + audit + drift + verify) all passed. No formal /ux + /design pre-merge-review dispatched (enhancement scope, no UX changes — only consolidation).
Phase 6 approved. CI green on both PRs (#84 + #290). User explicitly approved merge of #84.
Phase 7 opened. PR #84 merged via squash 185c0d8 at 18:45:11 UTC. PR #290 (FT2 backlog correction) still OPEN awaiting user merge.

Phase 7 complete. fitme-story PR #84 merged (squash 185c0d8). FT2 PR #290 (backlog correction + new control-room item) deferred to user-merge timing — does not block feature closure since main implementation PR is in.
Phase 8 (Documentation) opened. Writing case study + memory entry + state.json closure.

Phase 8 (Documentation) complete. Case study at docs/case-studies/fitme-story-design-system-p2-cleanup-case-study.md. State.json updated to current_phase=complete with all 9 phases approved, timing measured (~38 min total wall time), case_study + parent_case_study fields populated. Memory entry extended via parent feature memory file.

Feature COMPLETE. 4 of 16 P2 audit items shipped (P2-022 / P2-027 / P2-029 / P2-040). 12 explicitly deferred with rationale (8 task-level + 4 partial-deferral within shipped tasks). Public Figma parity 20/20 = 100% maintained. Drift 0 throughout. Total wall time 38 min. Honest read: ~30% of P2 audit recommendations are clean wins; the rest require new variants or judgment.
Feature transitioning to current_phase=complete. All 9 phases approved. Total measured wall time: 38 min.
